narrative:
Precinct Monclova 5 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,032 registered voters, with 45.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
